productDisplayName: Fila Men's Dignity Green Flip Flop
description: On a sunny day or a rainy afternoon, walk in these flip-flops and look cool. With a soft footbed and elastic grip straps, the footwear will stay firm on your feet and provide you a comfortable journey.Upper Synthetic footbed for durability Elastic back strap for firm support at the ankle and snug Fit for the entire foot Lightweight for added comfort Midsole Lightweight midsole for extra comfort Black footbed splattered with print for a glamorous look, created with an ergonomic fit Outsole Carbon rubber outsole for added durability Lugged rubber outsole for superior grip on uneven or smooth surface Wash careDo not machine washRub with soft cloth to clear off dust and dirt
